ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sprint (e.g., Active, Completed, Planned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sprint's goals and objectives */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the sprint belongs */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the sprint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sprint was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the sprint */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sprint was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint to which the user story belongs */,
  "epic" TEXT /* Epic or functional requirement the user story is part of */,
  "user_story_number" TEXT /* Number assigned to the user story */,
  "user_story_title" TEXT /* Title of the user story */,
  "story_points" INTEGER /* Story points assigned to the user story (effort estimation) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the user story (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the user story belongs */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user story */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user story was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user story */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user story was last updated */,
  "acceptance_criteria" TEXT /* Acceptance criteria for the user story */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to complete the user story */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the user story */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user story (e.g., New, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story the task is associated with */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., To Do, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Team member assigned to the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the task belongs */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the task */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the task */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., Developer, Tester, Product Owner) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team member belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team member is assigned to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the team member record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team member record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the team member record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the team member record was last updated */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise or skills of the team member */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the team member (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, On leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Numerical weight assigned to the priority level for sorting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status level */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status level (e.g., To Do, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status level */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Numerical weight assigned to the status level for sorting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Sprint Report, User Story Report) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content and purpose */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the report belongs */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
